dialogue_text: It seems to me I can scarcely wait till I get to Oz, and you must admit this is a very long journey.
source_excerpt: "Nor I my heart," declared the Tin Woodman. "It seems to me I can scarcely wait till I get to Oz, and you must admit this is a very long journey."
